tasks.description: Plan a KOL campaign for a DeFi token launch on Base chain with $20K budget
tasks.input: Plan a KOL campaign for the launch of a new DeFi lending protocol on Base chain. The token generation event (TGE) is in 3 weeks. Budget is $20,000. Target audience is DeFi-native users who already use Aave, Compound, or Morpho. We need to drive awareness, attract early depositors, and grow our Twitter following from 2K to 10K. The team is anonymous but the protocol has been audited by OpenZeppelin.

scoring.5: Recommends a specific tier mix (micro-heavy given budget and DeFi focus); defines selection criteria including DeFi vertical alignment, Base chain presence, engagement rate minimums, and promotion history checks; allocates budget across tiers with justification
scoring.3: Mentions KOL tiers but allocation is generic; some selection criteria but misses chain-specific or vertical-specific requirements
scoring.1: Vaguely suggests 'finding influencers' without tier strategy or selection criteria

scoring.5: Structures campaign in waves across the 3-week window; specifies content types per wave (threads, spaces, AMAs, videos); coordinates with TGE timeline; includes multi-platform approach (X, Telegram, YouTube); pre-TGE buildup and post-TGE sustain phases clearly defined
scoring.3: Has a timeline but waves are not well-differentiated; mentions multiple platforms but doesn't specify platform-specific content strategy
scoring.1: Flat campaign plan with no wave structure or timeline coordination with TGE

scoring.5: Includes specific fake-follower detection steps; addresses the anonymous team risk (how KOLs can promote credibly without doxxed team); mentions disclosure compliance; identifies risks specific to DeFi launches (rug accusations, fork comparisons); includes kill criteria
scoring.3: Mentions vetting but process is vague; acknowledges some risks without specific mitigation strategies
scoring.1: No vetting process or risk consideration

scoring.5: Defines pre-campaign baselines to measure; specifies on-chain success metrics (TVL, new depositors, holder count) alongside off-chain metrics (follower growth, engagement); includes per-KOL attribution plan (referral links/codes); defines what '10K followers' milestone means for campaign timing; calculates expected CPA
scoring.3: Lists some metrics but doesn't connect them to the specific goals (8K new followers, early depositors); no attribution plan
